title: Authentication vs Authorisation
summary: Quick guide to understanding the difference between authentication and authorization: learn how to verify user identity and control access to secure systems.

title: Basics of GitHub Actions
summary: Introduction to GitHub Actions CI/CD automation: learn workflows, jobs, steps, and build your first continuous integration and deployment pipeline on GitHub.

title: Docker Overview for Beginners and Beyond
summary: Comprehensive Docker guide for beginners: understand images, containers, Dockerfiles, Docker CLI, volumes, networking, Docker Compose, and practical deployment strategies.

title: Kotlin DSL vs Groovy DSL in Android Gradle: Which One Should You Use?
summary: Practical comparison of Kotlin DSL and Groovy DSL for Android Gradle: learn about type safety, IDE support, performance, and when to migrate your build scripts.

title: Kubernetes Guide for Container Orchestration
summary: Kubernetes fundamentals guide covering cluster architecture, Pods, Services, Deployments, StatefulSets, and production-ready container orchestration concepts.

title: Linux Skills Every Android, Backend, and Cloud Developer Should Know
summary: Essential Linux guide for developers: master commands, file management, permissions, processes, networking, SSH, Docker, and deployment skills for Android, Spring Boot, and AWS.

title: Most Commonly Used Design Patterns in Java Backend Development (Spring Boot)
summary: Comprehensive guide to essential design patterns for Spring Boot development: learn Singleton, Factory, Builder, Adapter, Observer, Strategy patterns with real examples and best practices.

title: SQL Interview Questions
summary: Common SQL interview questions covering CRUD operations, joins, normalization, indexes, transactions, and performance optimization for database developer interviews.

title: SQL Roadmap for Developers: From Basics to Advanced Queries
summary: Complete SQL learning guide for developers covering CRUD operations, joins, grouping, subqueries, indexes, transactions, normalization, and real-world database optimization.

title: Serializable vs Parcelable in Android: Which One Should You Use?
summary: Compare Serializable and Parcelable in Android: understand performance differences, when to use @Parcelize, and best practices for passing data between screens efficiently.

title: Why I Built StocKeeper — And the Real Problems It Solves
summary: Discover how StocKeeper solves real inventory, expiry tracking, and shared stock problems for homes, small businesses, and shared spaces with a simple Android app.

title: Setting Up Android CI with GitHub Actions: A Practical Step-by-Step Guide
summary: Step-by-step guide to setting up Android CI with GitHub Actions, including unit tests, lint checks, APK/AAB builds, artifact uploads, and branch protection rules.

title: Part 1: Architecture and Deployment Strategy for Full-Stack Applications
summary: Comprehensive guide to planning cost-effective full-stack deployments: learn architecture decisions, Lightsail vs EC2, Docker strategy, domain setup, and deployment best practices.

title: Part 2: Backend Deployment on AWS Lightsail
summary: Step-by-step backend deployment guide: provision Lightsail, run Docker containers, set up MySQL, configure Nginx, enable HTTPS, and deploy production-ready APIs.

title: Part 3: Frontend Deployment, Domains, SSL, and Troubleshooting
summary: Complete guide to connecting Vercel frontend to Lightsail backend: set up custom domains, configure DNS, enable HTTPS with Let's Encrypt, fix CORS and SSL issues.
